codeReview.summary: The route-level behavior (custom-view-first, product fallback, then notFound) is implemented as specified, but the custom-view renderer has a blocking fallback defect for IMAGE_TEXT_BLOCK data.

issues.description: The missing-translation fallback for IMAGE_TEXT_BLOCK sets `image: ''`, then ImageTextBlock renders `<Image src={data.image}>` unconditionally (`src/views/custom-view-page/components/image-text-block.tsx:12`). This can trigger Next image loader errors for empty src (see `node_modules/next/dist/shared/lib/image-loader.js:58`) instead of graceful fallback rendering, violating VAL-I18N-004's no-crash expectation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The nextjs-worker procedure says to read `.factory/library/` before implementation, but this session did not show any `.factory/library` reads while still reporting `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/nextjs-worker/SKILL.md` step 2 requires reading `.factory/library/`. Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId `01d734ec-7ee6-4dad-9402-05dafc1cea07` includes reads for mission docs and `.factory/services.yaml` but no reads under `/Users/nhan.nguyen/Documents/dobamboo-website-new/.factory/library/`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Unknown-slug behavior is documented in routing validation as 404, but project `notFound` implementation is redirect-based (307 first). This should be documented consistently in shared state to prevent ambiguity in route checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `src/i18n/navigation.ts` defines `notFound(locale)` via `redirect(...)`. The worker handoff for this feature records `curl .../en/nonexistent-slug-xyz123` observing HTTP 307 redirect to `/en/not-found`.

summary: Verdict: fail. The routing priority logic is present, but IMAGE_TEXT_BLOCK fallback data can crash missing-translation paths due to an empty `next/image` src, so graceful fallback behavior is not fully met.
